mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (content, writer, parent_no, regdate) VALUES (#{content}, #{writer}, #{parentNo}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE parent_no = #{parentNo}
SELECT c.*, (SELECT name FROM member WHERE no = c.writer) AS writer_name FROM comment c WHERE c.parent_no = #{parentNo} ORDER BY c.regdate DESC LIMIT #{startIdx}, 10
